name: Custom Error Messages
summary: Override default AJV validation error messages with user-friendly text using `errorMessage` in schema
whenToUse: Making validation errors more helpful and human-readable
Providing guidance on the expected format (e.g., 'First name must only contain letters')
When default AJV messages like 'must match pattern' are not user-friendly

errorMessage.pattern: First name must only contain letters.
errorMessage.minLength: Minimum length for first name is 2 characters.
errorMessage.maxLength: Maximum length for first name is 15 characters.

errorMessage._: Please enter a valid email address.

notes: Add `errorMessage` object to any property in the data schema
Map each constraint keyword (pattern, minLength, maxLength, format) to a custom error string
Use `"_"` as the key for a default message that applies to ALL constraints on that field
If a constraint is omitted from errorMessage, the default AJV error is used
The `required` field validation message is NOT customizable — it always shows '{fieldName} is required'
Keep error messages at grade 9 reading level for citizen-facing government forms
